Devil2025

A Kannada political action thriller featuring Darshan in a dual role — a corrupt system versus an unstoppable force.

KantaraEpic

Rishab Shetty's cultural phenomenon — where tribal folklore collides with modernity in a raw, mythic climax that took the world by storm.

Official Trailer
Mark2025

Kichcha Sudeep as a suspended cop unravelling child kidnappings and a deep political conspiracy — a fast-paced Kannada crime thriller.
